sigWerNormalizedGold: 我 已 打 开 app
sigWerNormalizedPredicted: 我 一 打 开 app

sigWerErrors.reason: '已' means 'already', while '一' means 'one'; this changes the meaning of the sentence from 'I have already opened the app' to 'I open the app once' or 'as soon as I open the app', which significantly alters the intended meaning.
